full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words. Count number of words before providing the message to meet the word count requirement.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (GENERIC):
Write a general, broadly appealing ad that is NOT tailored to any personality trait.
Keep the framing neutral: avoid strong social/crowd language AND avoid novelty/abstract “exploration” language.
Do not imply “quiet solo recharge” either—stay balanced and mainstream.

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Fitness app
INTERNAL_VARIANT = GENERIC
FACTS_LINE = Personalized workouts from 10–30 minutes, progress tracking, and adjustable plans for strength, cardio, or mobility.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 1

content.hook: Get fit on your schedule with a smarter fitness app.
content.facts: Personalized workouts from 10–30 minutes, progress tracking, and adjustable plans for strength, cardio, or mobility.
content.framing: The app tailors workouts to fit your lifestyle, whether you have 10 minutes or half an hour to spare. Adjustable plans let you focus on what matters most—strength, cardio, or mobility—so you can balance your routine without guesswork. Progress tracking helps you stay on course, making it easier to see results and keep moving forward.
content.cta: Download the app to start your flexible fitness plan today.
content.full_message: Get fit on your schedule with a smarter fitness app. Personalized workouts from 10–30 minutes, progress tracking, and adjustable plans for strength, cardio, or mobility. The app tailors workouts to fit your lifestyle, whether you have 10 minutes or half an hour to spare. Adjustable plans let you focus on what matters most—strength, cardio, or mobility—so you can balance your routine without guesswork. Progress tracking helps you stay on course, making it easier to see results and keep moving forward. Download the app to start your flexible fitness plan today.
